inline_comments.message: The JIRA Issue should be part of the footer of the message. Additionally, you should prefix it with either Issue: or JIRA:

sorry, i didn't get you fully, pls correct if anything wrong in below commit message, thanks

-----------
Add jenkins job for cli project

JIRA: CLI-4

Change-Id: Icd4140d16c6b85f7ba5764f85d8f937ec255847a
Signed-off-by: Kanagaraj Manickam k00365106 <kanagaraj.manickam@huawei.com>

You need to resubmit your change modifying the commit message. The CLI-4 needs to be part of the _footer_ of the message.

Commit messages are just like email messages they have the following format:

[subjectline]
<emptyline>
[body] (one or more paragraphs)
<emptyline>
[footerblock]

I'm stating that the JIRA issue needs to be part of the footerblock which contains the Change-Id and your DCO line, not part of the body.
Thank you for moving this to the footer but I suppose I should have been a bit more clear on this. It should additionally be prefixed with either 'Issue: ' or 'JIRA: ' as well.
